title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; interact with Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLMs, embedders, and tool callers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now named Open WebUI); chat, PDF, RAG, user management, plugins.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive terminal UI for chatting with Ollama models, written in Go.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for code completion.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Experimental repo showcasing autonomous agents (ReAct, Baby-AGI) backed by Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat over your docs.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama; chat, embeddings, and model management in JVM projects.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Collection of copy-paste curl snippets for every Ollama REST endpoint.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models; slash commands, thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama; mention the bot in channels or DM for instant answers.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package adding Ollama models as a backend for chat and embeddings with admin UI.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim client for Ollama; static binary, tiny runtime, and full API coverage.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed wrappers over Ollama’s REST API with Tokio support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama; supports .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators and embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Hugging Face space template to stream Ollama models behind a Gradio chat interface.
